body.title: Day 2026-07-02
body.text:
## Done
- T-domain-owns-loop-and-escalation (XL) — shipped-unproven @b3ccc1f3+91ae4b73; ONE shared AgenticLoop + pluggable codec, BaseDomain.run() single escalation owner, 16/16 money-safety parity proven
- T-thin-ds-to-domain-consumer (M) — shipped-unproven @165a52b3; DS now a pure coding-domain consumer (deleted prompt/skill/loop glue)
- Filed T-fix-routing-compiler-add-compiled-rule (pre-existing selector fail, pri 0.2)
- DESIGN SESSION (Akien's accumulated dump → sorted): captured the compiled-inference thesis + filed alarm tickets + captured the big refactor for review.
- T-capability-mixin-coding-capability — Introduce CapabilityMixin + CodingCapability (thin mixin HAS-A a Domain, delegates) (Introduced unseen_university/capabilities/ — CapabilityMixin (thin HAS-A a Domain, lazy _domain, no __init__) + CodingCa)
- T-codebuilder-compose-ds — Compose CodingCapability onto the coding worker (DickSimnel) — prove the mixin delegation path (DickSimnelDevice now composes CodingCapability (class DickSimnelDevice(CodingCapability, BaseDevice)); _run_inference de)
- T-worker-instance-identity — Worker instance identity surface: instance_name = abbrev.number; agent_id = self.instance_name (IdentityMixin (capabilities/identity.py) gives a worker instance_name='<abbrev>.<number>'; DickSimnel composes it (insta)
- T-alarm-callsites-groundloop-db-install — Give ground_loop / DB / installer a mouth: raise_alarm at three should-not-happen callsites (raise_alarm wired at 3 should-not-happen callsites (5 insertions): ground_loop supervisor import+runtime failure (ground)
- T-vetinari-owns-alarm-escalation — Vetinari escalates unresolved system alarms into Akien's feed / a Claude-readable channel (Vetinari's periodic sweep (DirectiveListener ~5min block) now calls sweep_system_alarms(), which reuses the existing not)
- T-vetinari-alarm-retry-default-path — Fix hollow retry contract: Vetinari alarm escalation retry-on-failure is dead on the default (production) channel-post path (_default_channel_post returns bool (False on swallowed failure); _escalate_alarm treats 'posted is False' as failure so )
- T-shim-frontdoor-on-groundloop — Shim as persistent front-door on the Ground Loop (daemon + MCP receive) — resolve interface, then decompose (Shim front-door on the Ground Loop: DickSimnelFrontDoor is a persistent runme.py front-door (RunmeSupervisor-loaded) tha)
- T-shim-lease-instance-numbers — Class-shim leases reusable instance numbers over a per-class free-list (live object + PID fallback) (Per-class instance leasing shipped: reusable InstancePool free-list (slot idx = instance number, slot = pid+create_time+)
- T-worker-pool-semantics — Pool semantics: max_instances (singleton = pool-of-1), .0 durable / 1+ ephemeral wiped on startup (Pool cap + ephemeral wipe shipped (singleton = max_instances=1, no special case). InstancePool.allocate returns None whe)
- T-worker-idle-sleep-bus-ask — Shim idle-sleeps a device via bus ask ('whatcha workin on?'); busy/dead disambiguated by PID (Idle-sleep shipped as a race-free refinement (instance owns the idle decision, fire-and-forget — divergence from D-worke)
- T-granny-wake-not-launch — Granny wakes-not-launches via the front-door; remove granny.yaml DS.0 launch_cmd + daemon static-worker handling (Granny no longer launches any worker — removed _launch_builder, its run_once launch block, _last_launch_attempt, GRANNY_)
- T-granny-mru-and-stall-alarm — Granny keeps an MRU of wakeable workers; no-wakeable + none-available -> system_alarm + stalled state + resume (Granny stall-alarm + park/resume shipped (closes the orphaned-front-door detection deferred through the front-door/wake )
- T-alarm-callsites-groundloop-db-install (M) — alarm SOURCES: raise_alarm at ground_loop-start / db-unreachable / install-permission-denied; + docstring principle "an alarm = anything Akien and Claude must look at together". Linked D-system-alarms-and-tier-requests.
- T-vetinari-owns-alarm-escalation (M) — alarm SINK: Vetinari (already the administrator) escalates unresolved alarms to Akien's feed / a Claude channel; wires the orphaned system_alarm_notifier. Depends (soft) on the sources ticket.
- architecture/compiled-inference-thesis (thesis note) — three-layer starvation model (resolver→0 / proof-obligation→partial / gates CP1–CP6→never); contradiction-not-veto; warden(moodless invalidation)-vs-evaluator(appraisal dial) split; cortical columns → reference-frames-in-the-fascia ("same question" = same frame-position, not vector-cosine); decompose→triage "starvation gate" pipeline stage; intent-preservation keystone; belief-as-inspectable-tool. Source: ~/.unseen_university/akien/20260702.ClaudeWebOnCorticalColumnsAndEachQuestionATreeAndPrediction.txt
- decision D-agent-capability-mixins-over-domains-2026-07-02 (status: open, spawns NO tickets yet) — THE BIG NEXT REFACTOR. Agent(root) + capability = MIXIN that HAS-A Domain object (CodingCapability has-a CodingDomain; compose, not is-a — don't re-fuse what D-domain-object-encapsulation just split). CodeBuilder = Agent + CodingCapability + glue. Domains generalize (coding → research/review/…). Three layers become KINDS OF MIXIN, not an inheritance spine. Retire Discworld CLASS names for functional ones BUT preserve the stance-vs-capability signal (the names silently encoded judgment-never-starves vs resolver-starves). Vetinari=strict admin (wrong to interview); Moist=people-person interviewer/intake (doesn't exist yet). Open Qs: compose-vs-is-a confirm, instance-handle de-Discworld?, layer/role taxonomy expression, Agent-vs-BaseDevice relation + migration blast radius.

Theme: shipped the entire front-door/worker-pool chain (10 tickets proven). See 20260702.slate.txt.
